_note: Community-curated loadout presets. Each preset names primary/secondary/grenade/4 stratagems/armor/booster + a recommended scenario. The user can apply and then dial difficulty/faction independently.

presets.name: Default Helldiver
presets.blurb: Vanilla starter kit — Liberator + Peacemaker + Frag, MG Sentry + Eagle Airstrike + Orbital Precision + EAT-17 (first anti-heavy unlock at level 5).

presets.name: Infinite (no reload)
presets.blurb: Sickle (heat-vent) + Stun Lance (melee) + Quasar (cooldown) + Guard Dog Rover + Gas grenade. Nothing in the kit ever runs out of ammo.

presets.name: SPEAR anti-tank
presets.blurb: FAF-14 SPEAR locks onto fabricators / bile titans from range. Supply pack keeps the tube fed.

presets.name: Recoilless anti-tank
presets.blurb: GR-8 Recoilless + reserve uplink. Two-shot Chargers via leg strip → weak point.

presets.name: Autocannon all-rounder
presets.blurb: AC-8 covers light through heavy. Backpack is the AC's reload, so no shield. Senator handles armored stragglers.

presets.name: Supply + Scorcher
presets.blurb: PLAS-1 Scorcher chews medium armor; supply pack feeds it + grenades. Stalwart for chaff.
